validation_reason: Strict validator ran after binary Excel/OLE .xls parser support. Approved raw evidence was present, SHA-256 matched, and 800 aggregate rows were parsed, but mapping-readiness validation failed because required source_symbol/ticker/exchange/security_id_mapping_reference fields were not all recognized by the validator and approved security_id mapping remains required. No row-level data was committed.
static_cohort_bias_warning: CSI800_STATIC_2026_06 is a static research cohort, not historical point-in-time CSI 800 membership.
report_boundary: This is an aggregate evidence validation report only, not a materialization manifest, run manifest, dataset manifest, or row-level membership artifact.
